decisions.briefing: Markets are firmly risk-on today with NASDAQ up 0.9% and S&P 500 up 0.6%, a strong backdrop for adding exposure. With only $67.94 in cash and 3 open slots sitting empty, I'm trimming one share of QQQ to free capital, then deploying into the three strongest technical setups — SOC (score 100), INOD, and RGTI — filling all remaining slots and reaching the 10-position maximum.

market_education.summary_en: Equities rallied broadly today with the NASDAQ gaining 0.9% and the S&P 500 rising 0.6%, driven by continued investor appetite for growth and technology stocks. AI-infrastructure names and semiconductor-adjacent plays attracted strong institutional flows as the market sustained its bullish trend into late May. The broad advance across sectors signals that money managers remain overweight equities relative to defensive assets like bonds and gold, sustaining the risk-on tone.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股今日全面上揚，那斯達克指數漲0.9%、標普500指數漲0.6%，市場風險偏好維持高位。人工智能基礎設施相關個股及半導體類股持續吸引機構資金進駐，五月下旬的多頭格局仍穩健。各板塊普遍走強，顯示基金經理人依舊超配股票，防禦性資產吸引力相對有限，市場風險偏好短期難以逆轉。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy that buys stocks trending strongly upward, based on the principle that assets with established directional strength tend to continue moving that way. Traders use indicators like RSI (ideal zone: 55–70), MACD crossovers, and price vs. moving average to identify the strongest setups. Today's top picks — SOC, INOD, and RGTI — all exhibit textbook momentum structure: bullish MACD crossovers, RSI in the sweet spot, and prices trading meaningfully above their 20-day averages without being overbought.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略專注買入強勢上漲的個股，其邏輯在於：已形成清晰趨勢的資產往往延續方向運動。交易者透過RSI（理想區間55至70）、MACD黃金交叉、以及股價相對20日均線的位置來篩選強勢標的。今日精選的SOC、INOD及RGTI均呈現典型動能結構：MACD黃金交叉確認、RSI落在甜蜜區間、股價明顯高於均線，且尚未進入超買區域，風險收益比良好。
